name: Short Rest
description: A period of light activity (reading, talking, eating, light wounds treatment). You may spend Hit Dice to recover Hit Points.

name: Long Rest
description: An extended period of sleep or light activity. Restores all Hit Points, half your maximum Hit Dice, and resets most limited-use features. Requires at least 1 HP to begin. Can only benefit from one Long Rest per 24 hours.
